narrative:
Precinct 0032 Turtle Creek (precinct in Shelby County) has 1,038 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.6 percentage points.
